content.en:
Northern Xun Boundary.

The gods of the Guya Realm came here on behalf of the Eastern Wu Realm to talk to the top forces in the Northern Xun Realm to discuss the benefits of support and treatment.

If it is not beneficial, the Eastern Wu Realm will not send the Realm God to support, otherwise it will weaken its own strength.

Soon, a high-level realm god from the Beixun realm came forward to discuss this matter with the Guya realm god~ .

"Guya Realm God, if you come to help in the Eastern Wu Realm, all the resources obtained from the Beixun Realm Seam Realm can be taken away, and there is no need to stay. The high-level realm god, the Longshan realm god, said.

The Guya Realm God smiled slightly: "Longshan Realm God, our Realm God came to support, the resources found in the Boundary Gap Realm originally belonged to us, could it be returned to you?" This is not a benefit and treatment, but a deserving." You should have to give us additional benefits and treatment, otherwise why would you use our realm gods of the Eastern Wu Realm to help you desperately. In terms of strength, the strength of your Beixun Realm is stronger, and we are weaker, we will not be able to bear it if we lose a little, and without any benefit, we will not fight hard. "

"Guya Realm God, we have more resources in the Beixun Realm Seam Realm, and you have been longing for it for a long time, besides, the Dongwu Realm Seam Realm of your Dongwu Realm is now in a silent period, and there are no resources to obtain for the time being, this is also your chance!"

The god of the Guya Realm shook his head again, "These are two different things, you have to pay the price if you ask for the help of the top forces of other realms, besides, our Dongwu Realm is 100% sure to solve your crisis and kill a large number of demon seeds." "

"100% sure, where do you get the confidence?"

The gods of the Longshan Realm were very puzzled.

After all, he also knows a thing or two about the strength of the Dongwu Realm, and it is not as good as the Beixun Realm!

At this time, the Gu Ya Realm God said: "Longshan Realm God, our Dongwu Realm gave birth to an invincible mid-level realm god, whose strength is much stronger than that of ordinary high-level realm gods, enough to sweep away the middle-level demon seeds, and even be able to kill high-level demon seeds. "

"Guya Realm God, you're not kidding, are you?"

The gods of the Longshan Realm couldn't believe it, this was too exaggerated!

"Is it necessary for me to joke about this matter?" said the Gu Ya Realm God very seriously and solemnly, without the slightest hint of joke.

Seeing this, the Longshan Realm God was a little convinced, "Guya Realm God, if your Dongwu Realm really gave birth to such a demonic mid-level realm god, and helped our Beixun Realm get rid of the crisis, you can mention it, but it can't be too much!"

Seeing this, the Guya Realm God spoke: "A large amount of Black Leaf Demon Gold, as well as some precious resources......"

The god of the Guya Realm took the opportunity to ask for some resources exclusive to the Beixun Realm, and asked for a lot at one time.

These resources are naturally not for Ye Tian, but for the Dongwu Ancient Sect.

He is equivalent to an intermediary, he can't work in vain, so he naturally has to take the opportunity to ask for some benefits, anyway, when the time comes, he only needs to give the Black Leaf Demon Gold to the Ye Heavenly Realm God, and the other benefit resources naturally belong to the Dongwu Ancient Sect, and it is a big deal to allocate some resources to the human race and other top forces when the time comes.

He will not monopolize it, otherwise once it is exposed, he will undoubtedly offend other top forces and offend Ye Tian.

"Guya Realm God, you want too many things!"

The Longshan Realm God frowned, obviously feeling that the Guya Realm God was a little too much, and the things he wanted were beyond his reach.

However, the two sides continued to negotiate and finally agreed on a price.

Of course, the premise is that Ye Tian can do what the gods of the Guya Realm said, and can help the Northern Xun Realm defeat those demon seeds, if he doesn't do it, these resources will naturally not be given.

And the gods of the Guya Realm were naturally full of confidence in Ye Tian, and they were already fantasizing about those resource treasures.

......

Eastern Ukrainian Boundary.

The Guya Realm God came back and informed Ye Tian of the outcome of this negotiation, but concealed those rewards, and only promised to give a large amount of Black Leaf Demon Gold, and said nothing else.

Ye Tian was also able to guess some, but he didn't care about these.

Because he only cares about the Black Leaf Demon Gold, and he also knows very well that it is impossible for the gods of the Guya Realm to be busy in vain, so a fool would do this!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian followed some of the middle-level realm gods among the top forces in the Eastern Wu Realm to the Northern Xun Realm together.

This time, the Eastern Wu Realm sent a total of three hundred middle-level realm gods and sixteen high-level realm gods, which was already very large.

However, those top forces in the Northern Xun Realm still felt that the number of these Realm Gods was not enough, because their pressure was too great, and they naturally hoped that the Eastern Wu Realm would send more Realm Gods.

But in fact, it only took Ye Tian and a realm god to reverse the situation.

Soon.

Ye Tian and the others entered the realm of the North Xun Realm Seam, which was also the first time that Ye Tian entered the realm of the North Xun Realm Seam.

"The boundary of the North Xun Realm Seam, the energy here seems to be more intense than the boundary of the East Wu Realm Seam!"

After that, he went deep into the Rift of the Northern Xun Realm and began to look for traces of the demon seeds.

In this realm of the rift, the gods of the realm are in a terrible situation, they have been hiding and fleeing, while the demon seeds are very arrogant.

Therefore, Ye Tian could easily find the demon seed, and he didn't even need to look for it, standing there and not moving, there would be a demon seed coming to him.

Really. []

He met the first demon seed, which was a mid-level demon seed, and he shot directly and killed the other party in an instant.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to search for demon seeds, killing these demon seeds one by one, and soon encountered high-level demon seeds, exerted terrifying strength, and instantly killed a high-level demon seed.

In this way, one demon seed after another was killed by Ye Tian, giving them no hope of escaping.

Gradually, a large number of demon seeds were killed by Ye Tian.

After a while, the demon seeds also sensed that something was wrong and began to besiege Ye Tian.

However, they underestimated Ye Tian, and in an operation to besiege Ye Tian, they directly lost six high-level demon seeds and dozens of middle-level demon seeds, which also made the demon seeds have a trace of fear.

The number of demon seeds is more than that of the realm gods, but the number is meaningless, after Ye Tian shows his invincible strength, the only thing waiting for these demon seeds is death.

A demon seed was killed, but the gods of the realm had little to lose.

This kind of result is something that the demon seeds don't want to see.

Time flies.

The situation in the Gap of the Northern Xun Realm has quickly reversed, and the gods of the realm no longer lose falls, but the demon seeds continue to lose demon seeds.

At this rate, how can the demon seeds still compete with the gods of the realm?
